scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:js
scripts.test:backend: cargo test --manifest-path contracts/ultrahonk_soroban_verifier/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path contracts/ultrahonk_verifier/Cargo.toml && CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo test --manifest-path contracts/blind_market/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:circuits: nargo compile --program-dir circuits/commit && nargo compile --program-dir circuits/claim && nargo compile --program-dir circuits/tally_update && nargo compile --program-dir circuits/tally_finalize && nargo compile --program-dir circuits/reputation
